name: Capital One Spark Miles Select for Business

welcome_offer.description: Earn 50,000 bonus miles once you spend $4,500 on purchases within the first 3 months of opening an account

earning_rates.notes: Earn 1.5X miles on every purchase, everywhere — no categories, no limits

other_benefits: Miles can be transferred to 15+ Capital One travel partners

sources.notes: CardRatings review: no brand loyalty required, flexible miles redemption
Capital One official page: 50,000 mile bonus for $4,500 in 3 months
The Points Guy: Spark Miles Select is the no-fee entry to Capital One business miles ecosystem

notes: No annual fee business travel card. 1.5X miles on all purchases (same earning as Spark Cash Select but in miles). 50,000 mile welcome bonus ($500 value). Miles are transferable to 15+ airline/hotel partners including British Airways, Avianca, and Flying Blue. Ideal for businesses that want travel rewards without paying an annual fee. Compare to Spark Cash Select if you prefer cash back.
